hero.description: FormaTexto proofreads in academic tone and formats your manuscript to your school's official guidelines. Two services, no learning curve, no rewrites you didn't ask for.
hero.dropPrompt: Drop your thesis, or click to browse
hero.fileLimit: Up to 50MB. Your file is encrypted in transit.
hero.linksSupported: Google Docs, OneDrive, or Dropbox links are supported.
hero.freeFirstPage: First page free — one-time trial, no card required

proofreading.label: Proofreading
proofreading.description: We catch typos, awkward phrasing, and tense slips. Suggestions stay scholarly: no overconfident rewrites, no voice changes you didn't ask for.

formatting.label: Formatting
formatting.description: Margins, headings, citations, references. We restructure your document to the standard your committee expects.

free.label: Free trial
free.subtitle: One page on us. First and only.
features: One free page — one time, either service

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to continue to FormaTexto.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: Your first page is free — one time only. No card required.

auth.checkEmail: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Click it to activate your account.
auth.resetSent: Password reset link sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: We'll send a reset link to your email.

dashboard.title: My documents
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Submit your first document to get started.

getStarted.title: New service
getStarted.subtitle: What does your thesis need today?
getStarted.ctaSubtitle: One-time trial — your first page is on us.

fileCard.invalidType: Unsupported file type. Please upload a Word document (.docx).
fileCard.docConvert: Old .doc format is not supported. Please convert your file to .docx before uploading.

getStarted.fileDeletionNotice: Your uploaded and processed files will be automatically deleted 30 days after project completion. Download your results before then. See our

project.noPreview: Preview not available for this file type.

references.title: References
references.hasSection: This document has a references section
references.disclaimer: References will not be proofread. Only the references section formatting will be adjusted. In-text citations will still be corrected.
references.noValidPages: None of the reference pages you entered are selected for processing.
references.partialWarning: Pages {{pages}} are not selected for processing and will be excluded from references.

profile.emailConfirmationSent: Confirmation link sent to your new address. Click it to confirm the change.
profile.changePasswordHint: Set a new password for your account.
profile.passwordModalSubtitle: Enter your current password to confirm your identity, then choose a new one.
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.passwordChangedNotice: Your password has been updated. A confirmation email has been sent to your address.
profile.deleteAccountNotice: Once deleted, your account and all associated data are permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteModalBody: This will permanently delete your account, projects, and all uploaded files. This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

pageSelection.title: Select pages to process
pageSelection.subtitle: Choose which pages you want us to work on. Your first page is free.
pageSelection.tip: Click pages to select or deselect them. Hold Shift to select a range.
pageSelection.rangeHint: Separate pages with commas, use a dash for ranges.
pageSelection.rangeError: No valid pages found. Check the format.
pageSelection.noDocument: No document found. Please go back and upload one.
